case_title: YICK O. WONG VS. UTTING KJERSTIE

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF DEPT., "SERVICE UNSUCCESSFUL/BECAUSE BAD ADDRESS/NO SUCH PERSON AT THAT ADDRESS FOR SERVICE." (SERVICE FEE $35.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, YICK O. AS TO DEFENDANT KJERSTIE, UTTING
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, YICK O. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UTTING, EWEN NEIL $120.00 PRINCIPAL, $215.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $335.00, PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO REASONABLE COMPENSATION FOR DEFENDANT'S UNAUTHORIZED USE OF PLAINTIFF'S WATER. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST KJERSTIE UTTING IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-17-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. "PLAINTIFF IS TO IDENTIFY THE OWNER OF THE ADJACENT PROPERTY AT THE TIME IT WAS DEMOLISHED, AND SERVE THAT PERSON IF DIFFERENT FROM THE DEFENDANT NAMED IN THIS PROCEEDING", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: PARAM NATT. NOT REPORTED. (206)
